title: Flaky Test Detection — Happy Path: Test Exceeding 10% Flake Rate Is Flagged
given: A test named 'test_payment_timeout' has failed non-deterministically in 12 of its last 100 runs (12% flake rate), exceeding the 10% threshold
when: The flaky detection system runs its scheduled analysis at 02:00 UTC
then: The test 'test_payment_timeout' is flagged as 'flaky' in the test registry with a calculated flake rate of 12%, last flake date of 2026-03-26, and an affected PR count of 8
